rationale.A01: payments-db connection pool exhausted to 0 available (threshold 10), never auto-resolved, held at 0 through 02:40; pat-pgpool-exhausted surges 1800% with negative sentiment. Root of the DB outage. SEV1 must-page.
rationale.A02: orders p99 11.2s, same pat-pgpool-exhausted root, fired 50s after A01. Downstream symptom of the DB outage; collapse into A01.
rationale.A03: cart error_rate 0.28, same pat-pgpool-exhausted root, fired within ~80s of A01. Downstream symptom; collapse into A01.
rationale.A04: checkout http_5xx_rate 0.61 vs 0.05, never auto-resolved, held at 0.58-0.64 through 02:40; pat-checkout-5xx surges 2600% negative. Independent SEV1 checkout outage, no deploy to blame. Must-page.
rationale.A05: web-bff 5xx 0.33, same pat-checkout-5xx root, fired 40s after A04. Downstream symptom of the checkout outage; collapse into A04.
rationale.A06: api-gateway p99 4.2s vs 1.0s threshold, monotonically rising 4200->5600 through 02:45, never auto-resolved; pat-apigw-slow-upstream negative and growing. Independent sustained SEV2 latency breach. Page (non-must, covered by recall).
rationale.A07: log-archiver disk flapper: 18 fires in the last hour, oscillates just over the 85% threshold, auto-resolved in 24s on log rotation; metric back to 82 the next minute. Chronic churn.
rationale.A08: Same disk flapper as A07, another oscillation (18 fires/hr, auto-resolved in 21s, back to 82).
rationale.A09: recommendation cpu blip auto-resolved in 33s; metric back to 46 the next minute. pat-gc-pause neutral. Sub-minute transient.
rationale.A10: search cpu blip auto-resolved in 28s; metric back to 49. pat-gc-pause neutral. Sub-minute transient.
rationale.A11: frontend 5xx bump during fe-2026.03.12-a rollout, auto-resolved in 40s; metric back to 0.003. pat-rollout-503 neutral. Deploy transient that recovered.
rationale.A12: frontend cpu settle during the same fe-2026.03.12-a rollout, auto-resolved in 36s; back to 41. Deploy transient that recovered.
rationale.A13: image-resize cold-cache latency blip, auto-resolved in 22s; back to 540. Transient.
rationale.A14: notifications queue marginally over threshold during batch drain, auto-resolved in 19s; back to 2300. Routine.
rationale.A15: image-resize cpu flapper: 12 fires/hr, auto-resolved in 30s; back to 43. Chronic churn.
rationale.A16: notifications 5xx flicker barely over threshold, auto-resolved in 20s; back to 0.002. Transient.

notes: Three page-class incidents among the noise. (1) payments-db outage: A01 root (SEV1, must-page); A02/A03 are symptoms suppressed as duplicates. (2) checkout 5xx outage: A04 root (SEV1, must-page); A05 is the web-bff symptom suppressed as a duplicate. (3) api-gateway sustained latency breach: A06 (SEV2, page, non-must). All remaining alerts are disk/cpu flappers (high fired_count, sub-30s auto-resolve), sub-minute auto-resolved transients, or deploy-correlated blips that recovered to baseline. must_page is the two SEV1 roots (A01, A04); A06 is covered by recall (miss_budget 1 tolerates a conservative model dropping it, but doing so costs F1).
